scope.forbidden_scope_summary: No broader route consumer migration, infrastructure provider/reset change, route path change, response model change, OpenAPI exposure change, frontend/config/script/OpenSpec edit, or PM2 command.

implementation.provider_behavior: Route-local FastAPI dependency provider delegates to src.monitoring.infrastructure.postgresql_async_v3.get_postgres_async().

red.failure: AssertionError: get_monitoring_analysis_postgres_async not found in module

verification.standards_read: architecture/STANDARDS.md governance and source-edit gates reviewed before implementation.

app_openapi_smoke.command: import app.main, call app.openapi(), and list app.api.monitoring_analysis routes with transient test environment values

openspec_validate.note: PostHog ECONNREFUSED telemetry noise may appear and is not an OpenSpec validation failure.

impact_before_edit.mcp: Attempted for get_health_score_history and analyze_portfolio; MCP transport closed.

impact_before_edit.cli_impact: impact command does not expose file-path or uid disambiguation; both symbols returned ambiguous with risk UNKNOWN.
impact_before_edit.status: degraded; recorded as gate degradation, not a low-risk graph approval

detect_changes.mcp: Attempted with scope=staged; MCP transport closed.
detect_changes.status: degraded; stale-index result is useful as a bounded warning but not current graph approval

residual_policy.next_gate: G2.254 no-source monitoring_analysis provider closeout / residual refresh should verify closure and select the next route consumer candidate. Do not migrate monitoring_watchlists.py or signal_monitoring from G2.253.
